query:
it is time to pickup issue 458 as a bugfix and execute in a worktree to avoid conflicts with other active work.  One piece of information to add: One thing today's logs add to the scope: The warnings include both        
  CoAccess and Supports edges with quarantined endpoints. The fix as scoped
  covers all relation types (it's a WHERE on endpoint status, not           
  relation_type), so no scope change needed — just worth noting when writing
   the test to include a Supports edge case alongside the CoAccess case.

entries.title: TypedRelationGraph: cycle detection requires Supersedes-only temp graph; full graph false-positives on CoAccess bidirectional pairs
ADR-002: edges_of_type as Sole Traversal Boundary for suppress_contradicts
ADR-004 addendum (bugfix-444): TypedRelationGraph rebuild must filter to exclude Quarantined entries
GRAPH_EDGES compaction must exclude quarantined entries (status=3), not just fully-deleted entries
Adding a RelationType variant requires four coordinated updates across two files or the new edge type is missing from graph traversal
